_comment: Category weights (%) must sum to 100 per vendor. Edit freely — this is the single source of truth for how much each category counts toward the overall Orbit2 score.

catworkx DE (TEST DATA)._comment: NOT a real vendor program — a test entry using catworkx DE's Partner Value Scorecard screenshot to verify the evidence-to-dashboard pipeline end to end. Safe to remove any time; does not affect Communardo's Atlassian scorecard.
